creator: andrews@TECHNOLOGIST.COM
text:
On Sat, Jul 08, 2000 at 10:06:20AM +0800, Michael Robinson wrote:
> The Makefile in the respective ports does not set the PKGNAME variable.  When
> the package is installed, it does so with a PKGNAME of "", which nukes the
> whole /var/pkg/db database.

What are you talking about??

<1 5006-0> (22:14:24) [will@radon /usr/ports/x11]% for i in XFree86
XFree86-4;do cd $i;make -V PKGNAME;cd ..;done
XFree86-3.3.6
XFree86-4.0

-- 
Will Andrews <andrewsw@purdue.edu> <will@FreeBSD.org>
